title: Titan Series Premium Triple-Braced Vinyl Padded Metal Folding Chair - Black
features: A commercial-grade vinyl padded metal folding chair built for hotels, conference centers, churches, and party rental operations that need guest comfort alongside high-frequency durability.

An 18-gauge powder-coated steel frame with triple U-bracing, quad hinges, and a 500 lb. static weight capacity provides the structural foundation, while a vinyl padded seat and backrest keep guests comfortable through extended seated events.

Padded seat and backrest reduce guest discomfort at longer events. Vinyl upholstery over a padded core delivers meaningful comfort improvement over hard-shell folding chairs, making these well suited for multi-hour conferences, banquet dinners, church services, and hotel events where guest experience reflects directly on your organization.

Triple U-bracing and quad hinges keep the frame tight through heavy commercial use. Three reinforcement points across the back frame and four-point hinge construction prevent the flex and hinge wear that cause lesser folding chairs to loosen and wobble, maintaining consistent performance through thousands of setups.

Vinyl upholstery cleans fast and holds up to commercial use. Resistant to moisture, staining, and surface abrasion, vinyl wipes clean between events in seconds and won't fray, fade, or accumulate the soiling that fabric upholstery develops over a commercial rental or venue season.

At 12.5 lbs., setup and breakdown stay manageable at scale. Lighter than comparable padded folding chairs at this construction level, the weight advantage compounds quickly when a crew is moving hundreds of chairs across a large event setup.

Non-marring floor glides protect finished floors on every deployment. Built-in floor glides on all four leg feet prevent scratching on hardwood, vinyl, polished concrete, and other finished surfaces, reducing floor repair costs and facility complaints over the life of your inventory.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more

faq.question: How much weight can each chair hold?
faq.answer: All of our metal folding chairs are commercial-grade quality with a weight capacity of 500 pounds.

faq.question: Is there a warranty for Metal Folding Chairs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a 3 year product warranty on all of our Steel Folding Chairs.

faq.question: Do the chairs ship assembled?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our Metal Folding Chairs ship assembled.

faq.question: Will these Chairs rust?
faq.answer: Our Metal Folding Chair frames are powder coated to insure that the frame will not rust.

faq.question: Are Metal Folding Chairs CA117 Rated?
faq.answer: Yes, our chairs are CA117 rated. For more information, please visit www.p65warnings.ca.gov.
